title: YTPMV - Robotnik's Chemical Warfare Facility
description:
I love 007 Goldeneye music. It's one of the greatest games ever, and a defining moment in my N64 years. I always liked this song, and so I put a little something together that I found fitting.

The song comes from the 2nd level, Facility, which many people will remember for the fact that you have a rather difficult time to beat to unlock the Invicibility cheat.

DISCLAIMER: I don't own any of these clips. This video does not represent the opinions of the original creators of these clips. I am not profiting from their use in any way.
